description: Flyktninghjelpen/NRC in Haiti works to ensure that people affected by displacement and at risk of displacement due to escalating gang violence, fragmented control and checkpoints, and the collapse of basic services have access to timely, quality, inclusive, and relevant humanitarian assistance through a protection-enhancing approach. NRC provides lifesaving and protection-centred assistance through integrated programming. Core sectors include Education, Information, Camp Coordination and Camp Management (CCCM), and Shelter and Settlements. The project design is informed by a gender analysis, and all indicators are disaggregated by sex.
destPlan: Haiti Besoins Humanitaires et Plan de Réponse 2026
destGlobalClusters: Camp Coordination / Management,Education,Emergency Shelter and NFI,Protection

description: Flyktninghjelpen/NRC in Haiti works to ensure that people affected by displacement and at risk of displacement due to escalating gang violence, fragmented control and checkpoints, and the collapse of basic services have access to timely, quality, inclusive, and relevant humanitarian assistance through a protection-enhancing approach. NRC provides lifesaving and protection-centred assistance through integrated programming. Sectors include Information, counselling and legal assistance (ICLA) and Protection from violence (PfV).The project design is informed by a gender analysis, and all indicators are disaggregated by sex.
